title: Bloomberg TV Show
description: Represents a Bloomberg TV show or series, including metadata about the program, its hosts, schedule, regional broadcast, and category. Covers Bloomberg Television shows such as Bloomberg Surveillance, Bloomberg Markets, Bloomberg Technology, and Bloomberg Originals series.

slug.description: URL-friendly slug identifier for the show

description.description: Full description of the show and its editorial focus
examples: Connecting the dots across business, finance, economics and politics with conversations with leaders from Wall Street to Washington and beyond.

category.description: Primary content category or genre of the show

hosts.description: Regular hosts or anchors of the show

region.description: Primary regional broadcast market for this show

schedule.description: Human-readable description of the typical air schedule

imageUrl.description: URL to the show thumbnail or promotional image

url.description: URL to the show page on Bloomberg

isActive.description: Whether the show is currently in production and airing new episodes

tags.description: Tags or keywords associated with the show
